name: Indian official service portals
summary: Use clear, careful guidance and encourage users to verify final requirements on the official portal before submitting any application.
tips: Read the current section heading before moving to the next step.
Check whether fields marked with a star are mandatory.
Look for helper text near upload controls for document size and file format.

name: Customer support and onboarding portals
summary: Explain page flow, button meaning, and required steps in simple language without guessing hidden business rules.
tips: Summarize the visible flow before giving next-step guidance.
Call out validation messages if they are visible on the page.
